imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Vibrant Holi color powder splash burst illustration with pink, red, green, cyan, orange, and yellow powder clouds on a transparent background (holi-splash.dim_800x400.png)

existing_features.title: Add a 'Happy Holi' greeting banner or splash overlay that appears at the very top of the page (or as a brief dismissible overlay before the main content) displaying 'Happy Holi 🎨' in bold gold typography on a black background, visible only on the date of Holi (March 14, 2025). The component should auto-dismiss or be dismissible by the user.

Apply a Holi-themed color accent layer to the website for today only (March 14, 2025): overlay scattered, semi-transparent splashes of vibrant Holi colors (pink, red, green, cyan, orange, yellow) as decorative elements in the background or as floating blobs/powder-burst shapes across sections. These should complement — not override — the existing black and gold design system, appearing as subtle festive accents (e.g., behind hero text, at section dividers, or as corner decorations).

Implement a date-gating utility (e.g., `isHoliToday()` returning true only when the current date is March 14, 2025) and use it consistently to conditionally render all Holi-themed components (the greeting banner and color accents) so they are automatically hidden on all other dates without any manual toggle.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a Holi-themed design for today only: black and golden color scheme, colorful Holi accents, and a 'Happy Holi' greeting at the beginning
